common.footer: We build websites and systems that shorten decisions, capture demand and automate routine work.
common.homeText: Choose your field to see which features can generate more enquiries, sales or bookings for your business.
common.website: Do you already have a website?
common.industryIntro: Each page maps the sector’s friction points, essential features and clearest route to a measurable result.
common.readyText: Tell us where sales, bookings or team workflows slow down. We’ll outline a focused way forward.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The address is incorrect or the page has moved.

contact.title: Start With Context
contact.description: Briefly describe the goal and what is getting in the way. We’ll respond with a realistic next step for your business.

about.title: Systems That Work
about.description: Next-Hub Solutions combines business logic, clear design and dependable engineering. We build systems that shorten decisions and remove manual work.

items.question: How is the budget set?
items.answer: Pages, functionality and integrations shape the cost. After a short discovery call, you receive a staged estimate.

items.question: When will we see a working version?
items.answer: Timing depends on scope. Before work begins, we agree on clear stages and the result you will see at each one.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: We monitor performance, resolve issues and use real behaviour data to prioritise the next improvements.

form.name: Name
form.consent: I agree to the processing of my data to discuss this project.
form.required: Complete the required fields and accept the terms.
form.success: Thank you. We will contact you shortly.

construction.title: Accelerate Property Sales
construction.subtitle: Let buyers compare buildings, floors and available units themselves. Give your sales team a clearer, better-qualified enquiry.
construction.cardText: Buyers find the right unit faster, while sales teams receive better-qualified enquiries.
problems: Unit details live across different channels
Available properties are hard to find
Sales teams repeat the same answers

faq.question: Can availability update from our CRM?
faq.answer: Yes. Unit status and incoming leads can connect directly to your CRM.

faq.question: Can we add a 3D tour?
faq.answer: Yes. We can integrate 3D, 360° and video presentations.

construction.description: A developer website with unit selection, live availability, meeting booking and CRM connectivity.

tourism.title: Win Direct Bookings
tourism.subtitle: Let travellers choose a tour, review the full itinerary and pay on your website. Cut the messages between interest and confirmation.
tourism.cardText: Travellers choose an itinerary and complete the booking directly on your website.
problems: Tours only appear on social media

faq.question: Can customers pay online?
faq.answer: Yes. The platform can connect to local or international payment providers.

faq.question: Does AI create the entire tour?
faq.answer: AI suggests itineraries based on your real catalogue and business rules.

tourism.description: A travel website with tours, itineraries, online booking, payments and AI-assisted planning.

ecommerce.title: Keep Sales Moving
ecommerce.subtitle: Help shoppers find products and finish payment quickly. Manage orders, stock and delivery from one place.
ecommerce.cardText: Manage every step from product discovery to delivery in one connected store.

faq.question: Can it connect to our stock system?
faq.answer: Yes. We can integrate an ERP, warehouse system or another data source.

faq.question: Will mobile checkout be fast?
faq.answer: Yes. Checkout is designed around small screens and minimal steps from the start.

ecommerce.description: An online store with fast search, simple payment, delivery integration and actionable sales analytics.

healthcare.title: Book Without Calls
healthcare.subtitle: Let patients choose a service, doctor and available time online. Give administrators fewer calls and a schedule they can manage.
healthcare.cardText: Patients choose a doctor and time themselves, reducing calls for the clinic team.
problems: Doctor schedules are not visible online
Patients struggle to choose a specialist
ai: Finding the right service or specialist

faq.question: Does AI diagnose patients?
faq.answer: No. AI is only used for administrative assistance and never replaces a doctor.

faq.question: Can the system send reminders?
faq.answer: Yes. It can send automatic SMS or email appointment reminders.

healthcare.description: A clinic website with doctor profiles, live schedules, online booking and responsible reminders.

ai-automation.title: Automate Daily Work
ai-automation.subtitle: Connect enquiries, CRM, email and reporting in one flow. Bring people in only where judgement is needed.
ai-automation.cardText: Routine tasks run automatically, leaving the team focused on decisions that need people.

faq.question: What should we automate first?
faq.answer: Start with a frequent, rules-based and measurable process.

faq.question: Can this integrate with our CRM?
faq.answer: Yes. We connect to existing systems through secure APIs.

ai-automation.description: AI assistants, CRM connections and automated workflows for sales, support and reporting.
